title: Dharavi Ka Danda
subtitle: Mumbai ki zindagi mein chupi maut...
mystery: Dharavi ke mashoor dabbawale Ramesh Kamble ki laash chawl ke bahar mili. Koi bahar waala nahi aaya tha — sab apne hi the. Koi tha jo use khatam karna chahta tha.

clues.name: Toota Dabba
clues.description: Ramesh ka khaas delivery dabba toot hua mila — andar ek chitthi thi.

clues.name: Dhamki Chitthi
clues.description: Dabba mein likha tha: 'Zyada jaanta hai tu — chup reh.'

clues.name: Naya Bota
clues.description: Paas ki nali mein naya plastic bota — Suresh ki factory ka brand.

clues.name: Bachche Ki Baat
clues.description: Padosi ka bacha bola — kal ek chacha ne Ramesh ko dhakka diya tha.

characters.name: Suresh Naik
characters.description: Factory mein illegal chemicals use karta tha. Ramesh ko pata chal gaya tha.

dialogues.response: Haan, para mein rehta tha. Bas itna hi.

dialogues.trigger: Ye bota aapki factory ka hai?
dialogues.response: Bahut log use karte hain mera brand!

dialogues.trigger: Ramesh ne aapki factory ke baare mein kya jaana tha?
dialogues.response: Kuch nahi! Woh zyada poochh raha tha — mujhe rokna tha use!

characters.name: Meena Bai
characters.description: 3 saalon se Suresh se ladai chal rahi thi zameen ke liye.

dialogues.response: Haan, woh bol raha tha Suresh illegal kaam karta hai. RTI daalunga bolta tha.
Mere bete ne kaha Suresh chacha ne dhakka diya tha Ramesh ko — raat ke andhre mein.

characters.name: Dharma Kaka
characters.description: Raat ko duty karta hai. Kuch chhupaata lag raha hai.

dialogues.response: Ek aadmi aaya tha Suresh jaisa — mujhe laga apna hi koi hai toh roka nahi.

spots.name: Ghatna Ka Sthan 🚨
spots.description: Yahan laash mili thi — zameen pe nishan hain.

spots.name: Nali 🪣
spots.description: Badi nali — kuch floating kar raha hai.

spots.name: Chawl Ka Darwaza 🚪
spots.description: Chawl ka main darwaza — bacche yahan khel rahe hain.

title: Bandra Bungalow
subtitle: Ameer ghar mein gareeb sach...
mystery: Film producer Akash Mehta apni morning walk se wapas nahi aaye. Unhe bungalow ke swimming pool mein paya gaya. Police ko accident bata diya gaya — par clues kuch aur kahte hain.

clues.name: Toota Phone
clues.description: Pool ke paas Akash ka phone toot hua mila — last call 'P' ko.

clues.name: Dawai Ki Shishi
clues.description: Locker mein ek khaas neend ki dawai — 2 goli gayab, prescribed se zyada.

clues.name: Naya Will
clues.description: Table pe ek naya will — saari property Priya ke naam. Last week sign hua.

clues.name: CCTV Gap
clues.description: Bungalow ki CCTV recording mein raat 2-4 baje ka hissa delete hua.

characters.name: Priya Mehta
characters.description: Divorce ki baat chal rahi thi. Will mein naam tha. Raat bhar 'so rahi thi'.

dialogues.response: Main so rahi thi. Kuch nahi pata.

dialogues.trigger: Will mein sirf aapka naam kyun?
dialogues.response: Unhone khud kiya — mujhse poochha bhi nahi!

dialogues.trigger: Dawai ki 2 goli kyun gayab hain?
dialogues.response: Main... mujhe neend nahi aati... maine li hogi...

characters.name: Ramzan Driver
characters.description: 10 saal se kaam karta hai. Sab jaanta hai par chhupaata hai.

dialogues.response: Memsahib raat ko pool ke taraf gayi thi — 3 baje ke aaspaas. Main car mein so raha tha.

dialogues.trigger: Sahab ka phone kisi 'P' ko gaya tha?
dialogues.response: Sahab Priya madam ko call karte the jab fights hoti thi... ya woh nahi uthati thi.

characters.name: Sheela Maid
characters.description: Subah 6 baje aayi — pool dekh ke chillaayi.

dialogues.response: Sahab pool mein the — mujhe laga so rahe hain... phir samjha. Main toh darr gayi.

spots.name: Swimming Pool 🏊
spots.description: Neela pool — kinare pe kuch pada hai.

spots.name: Bedroom 🛏️
spots.description: Bada bedroom — locker thoda khula hai.

title: Studio Ka Script
subtitle: Glamour ke peeche ka andheraa...
mystery: Nayi film ka script chor liya gaya — jisme 10 crore ka budget tha. Script writer Anand Kapoor ka kehna hai yeh unka original kaam tha. Director ka kehna hai unka. Aur ab Anand ko kisi ne dhamki di hai.

clues.name: Copy Email
clues.description: Anand ke computer mein ek email — script director ko bheji gayi thi bina bataye.

clues.name: Khaas Pen
clues.description: Script pe ek khaas ink — sirf Vikrant director ki pen se match karti hai.

clues.name: Assistant Ki Baat
clues.description: Set assistant ne suna — Vikrant bola tha 'woh script meri hai, use chup karao.'

clues.name: Purana Contract
clues.description: Anand ka 3 saal purana contract — usme script rights director ke naam thi.

characters.name: Vikrant Roy
characters.description: Mashoor director. Script chori ka faida uthaya. Anand ko dhamki deta hai.

dialogues.response: Main saalon se is idea pe kaam kar raha tha — Anand ne copy ki meri!

dialogues.trigger: Aapki pen ki ink match karti hai?
dialogues.response: Bahut logo ke paas wahi pen hoti hai!
Woh jhooth bol raha hai! Mujhe frame kiya ja raha hai!

characters.name: Anand Kapoor
characters.description: Bahut talented par contract ka dhyan nahi rakha. Sach uski taraf hai.

dialogues.response: Feedback lena tha — galti hui meri. Par script meri hai!
Mujhe nahi pata tha rights unke naam thi! Lawyer ne clear nahi kiya tha!

characters.name: Ramesh Producer
characters.description: Paisa laga rakha hai. Jhagde se pareshan hai.

dialogues.response: Haan, Vikrant ne Anand ko bola tha — main khud sun raha tha phone pe.

spots.name: Set Ka Bahar 🎬
spots.description: Set ka baahari hissa — log baat kar rahe hain.

title: Chawl Ki Aag
subtitle: Mumbai ki chawl mein sulgta sach...
mystery: Dadar ki purani chawl mein aag lagi — aur usmein banda Gopal ki maut. Aag accident thi ya saazish? Fire brigade boli short circuit — par bijli ka bill unpaid tha 6 mahine se.

clues.name: Petrol Ki Gandhh
clues.description: Aag ke baad bhi ek jagah petrol ki khaas gandhh — short circuit mein nahi hoti.

clues.name: Double Insurance
clues.description: Gopal ki building ka insurance tha — nominee Nitin. 2 mahine pehle liya gaya.

clues.name: Jhulsa Lighter
clues.description: Chhati ke paas ek jhulsa hua lighter — Nitin ki qisam ka.

clues.name: Raat Wala Gawah
clues.description: Ek raat ko jaagna wala — Nitin ko petrol can le jaate dekha.

characters.name: Nitin Gopal
characters.description: Bhai se property ka jhagda tha. Insurance ka nominee tha. Lighter use karta hai.

dialogues.response: Dost ke ghar tha — sab raat bhar mere saath the!
Routine tha! Property old thi — sab karte hain!

dialogues.trigger: Gawah ne petrol can ke saath dekha?
dialogues.response: Galat pehchana hoga! Main gaya hi nahi tha wahan!

characters.name: Shanta Bai
characters.description: Raat ko jaag rahi thi. Khidki se sab dikhta hai usse.

dialogues.response: Nitin neeche se aaya tha raat ko — haath mein kuch tha. 10 minute baad aag lagi.

characters.name: Havaldar Tukaram
characters.description: Aag bujhayi. Kuch anokha tha aag mein.

dialogues.response: Ek jagah se start hua — aur woh jagah petrol se bheegi thi. Short circuit nahi tha yeh.

spots.name: Aag Wali Jagah 🔥
spots.description: Jaali hui jagah — kuch gandhh abhi bhi hai.

spots.name: Gopal Ka Kamra 🚪
spots.description: Adha jala kamra — mez pe kagaz hain.

spots.name: Chhati Ka Kona 🏚️
spots.description: Andhera kona — kuch pada hua hai.

spots.name: Khidki 🪟
spots.description: Khidki se bahar nazar jaati hai.

title: Colaba Ka Chor
subtitle: South Mumbai ki gehri saazish...
mystery: Colaba ke mashoor antique dealer Khan Sahab ki dukaan se 200 saal purana haathi daant ka idol chor liya gaya. Alarm nahi baja — koi jaanta tha system ko. Police hairan hai.

clues.name: Alarm Code
clues.description: Alarm system ka code badla gaya tha 3 din pehle — sirf ek naya employee jaanta tha.

clues.name: Kapde Ka Tukda
clues.description: Dukaan ki jaali mein ek high-end kapda — koi ameer banda ghusa tha.

clues.name: Online Listing
clues.description: Idol waisi cheez ek shady website pe list hua — seller ka naam 'R.S.'

clues.name: Master Key
clues.description: Counter ke neeche ek master key — kisi ne copy karwayi thi.

characters.name: Rahul Sharma
characters.description: 3 din pehle join kiya. Alarm code jaanta tha. 'R.S.' initials match karte hain.

dialogues.response: Haan, Khan sahab ne bola tha purana code weak tha.

dialogues.trigger: Online listing mein R.S. kaun hai?
dialogues.response: Main... bahut saare R.S. hote hain! Mere upar ilzaam mat lagao!
Emergency ke liye... Khan sahab ko pata tha! Mera matlab chori nahi tha!

characters.name: Arif Khan
characters.description: 30 saal purani dukaan. Rahul pe vishwas kiya — ab pachhtaa raha hai.

dialogues.response: Usne bahut achhi tarah interview diya. Recommendations bhi thi. Mujhe kya pata tha...

characters.name: Ramkhelawan Guard
characters.description: Raat ki duty thi. Kuch ajeeb tha.

dialogues.response: Alarm nahi baja toh main relaxed tha. Par ek aadmi dikha tha — achhe kapdon mein. Rahul jaisa tha.

spots.name: Security Panel 🔒
spots.description: Deewar pe security system — lights blink kar rahi hain.

spots.name: Peechhi Jaali 🪟
spots.description: Lohe ki jaali — kuch fansa hua hai.

spots.name: Counter 🏪
spots.description: Sheeshe ka counter — neeche drawer hai.

spots.name: Laptop 💻
spots.description: Purana laptop — browser khula hua hai.
